creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
icewm vs. ctwm: Submitter reported off-tracker that icewm does not exhibit these focus issues in JabRef. 

This was brought up on the ctwm mailing list here: <http://thread.gmane.org/gmane.comp.window-managers.ctwm/1661/focus=1678>

I'll conclude that this is a ctwm rather than a JabRef issue and close this bug until further evidence is presented.
